notable_phrases: busting our year-ago revenue performance by 54%
we wish we had more inventory of iPad and Mac
we're in the early days of 5G
summary: Apple reported record March quarter results with 54% revenue growth driven by strong iPhone 12 demand and services acceleration, though management flagged $3-4 billion in supply constraints primarily affecting iPad and Mac for the June quarter.
change_summary: vs 2021 Q1: Forward guidance sentiment decreased by 10.00.
